description: Maps SharePoint CSV column names to events.json field paths for the Safran Events Platform SharePoint Sync page.
notes: Exact CSV column names as exported from SharePoint. Booth%23 = URL-encoded Booth #. Staff_Assigned uses underscore. v1.1: Updated field paths to use Category 9 research.intelligence.show / .venue / .booth schema.

fieldMappings.notes: Primary title — comes from SharePoint, not modified by agent
Canonical value managed by humans in SharePoint. Agent cross-verifies to research.intelligence.show.startDate (Category 9).
Canonical value managed by humans in SharePoint. Agent cross-verifies to research.intelligence.show.endDate (Category 9).
Category 9: agent extracts street + number only. No city/state in this field.
Category 9: agent verifies city from official event website
Category 9: 2-letter abbreviation for US; province/region for non-US
Category 9: full country name (e.g. 'United States', not 'US')
Category 9: facility name only — no address or city in this field
Category 9: dimensions only e.g. '10 x 10'. Smallest standard size first.
Category 9: only populated if found on official published floor plan or exhibitor list
Category 1 (first-party): agent finds official show URL from official show website
Category 1 (first-party): agent finds official organizer name from show website
Category 9: final deadline for exhibitor application/booth registration. Distinct from earlyBirdDeadline (Category 3).
Category 1 (first-party): agent finds official show tagline or subject focus from show website

stateRules.state1: Original SharePoint data, unchanged. White background.
stateRules.state2: Agent populated a field that was empty in SharePoint. Light blue. NEW badge.
stateRules.state3: Agent corrected a field using a first-party source (official website or organizer doc). Amber. CORRECTED badge. Only identity agentSource fields or high/medium confidence.
stateRules.state4: Agent found conflicting data but source is not confirmed first-party. Red. REVIEW badge. Requires manual resolution.
